title: Mansion D RPC
description: Easy to configure to make your Discord Rich Presence better.
body:
# Mansion DRPC 
is a lightweight Fabric mod that adds a simple toggleable system for enabling or disabling Discord Rich Presence directly in-game. 
| Or in

```
config/discord_rpc_config.json 
```
Designed for ease of use and stability, this mod allows you to control DRPC features without needing to restart Minecraft.
- No external setup required — works out of the box

## ✨ Features
- Toggle Discord Rich Presence Enable or Disable with a single button
- Fast, simple, and minimal performance impact
- button active url

**and others in the future for sure.**
## 📥 Installation
Compatible with Minecraft (Fabric) 1.20 - 1.21.5

## 🧩 Compatible
### [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
If you have Mod Menu installed, you can quickly access this mod’s config button directly from the Mod Menu interface, making configuration even easier.
Mod Menu is not required for the mod to function.
## ⛓️Cross-Platform Connectivity
- [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)
- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

  _I tried using it together with the Forge version and it worked, but I'm not sure if there will be any issues._
## ⚠️ Important

Avoid spamming the Enable or Disable button.
Toggling too quickly may cause temporary freezes or unexpected behavior.
### 🪛 (Click) Config RPC or Configure To go to the settings and customization page
![The button will be in Chat Setting... and Mod menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/072d9999a2e18ef17f474d2dfe0397c4d7e7f925.png)![The button will be in Chat Setting... and Mod menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62dfc16bdb85c89e74e3aed990805076c4a9ab8a.png)
## ✅ Tip
After entering your desired information, go to the RPC Settings page and simply toggle the feature off and on again — no need to restart the game!
![Screen Custom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd2f8540b00e2794d299fde362255deee020f16.png)
